tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (Körperschaftsteuer)
tax_filing.summary: Annual return via ELSTER; corporate rate 15% + 5.5% solidarity surcharge + trade tax. Mandatory E-Bilanz electronic balance sheet to tax authority.

tax_filing.title: E-Bilanz (electronic balance sheet)
tax_filing.summary: All commercial enterprises must submit electronic balance sheet via ELSTER per §5b EStG.

tax_filing.title: Jahresabschluss (annual accounts) filing
tax_filing.summary: Annual financial statements filed with Bundesanzeiger; size-based disclosure rules per HGB §325.

vat_gst.title: German VAT — monthly/quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 19% / reduced 7% rates. Monthly returns for higher-volume; quarterly otherwise. Filed via ELSTER.

e_invoicing.title: Germany B2B e-invoicing — receiving capability mandatory
e_invoicing.summary: From 1 Jan 2025 all German B2B businesses must be able to receive structured e-invoices (XRechnung / ZUGFeRD / PEPPOL). Wachstumschancengesetz.

e_invoicing.title: Germany e-invoicing sending mandatory >€800K
e_invoicing.summary: Issuance of structured e-invoices mandatory for businesses with annual revenue >€800K from 1 Jan 2027.

e_invoicing.title: Germany e-invoicing sending mandatory — all businesses
e_invoicing.summary: Issuance mandatory for ALL B2B regardless of size from 1 Jan 2028.

payroll.title: German payroll — ~21% employer social burden
payroll.summary: Social security, health, pension, unemployment, long-term care contributions. ELSTER reporting. HIGH complexity. Strong DATEV ecosystem for accountants.

local_gaap.title: Handelsgesetzbuch (HGB) — German local GAAP
local_gaap.summary: HGB is local GAAP for unconsolidated/SMB statutory accounts; differs significantly from IFRS. Standardkontenrahmen (SKR 03/04) chart of accounts universally expected (DATEV).

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + DATEV bank integration
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking + SEPA rails. DATEV bank-feed integration is critical for the German accountant channel.
